name: Mushy
background: Spore-Warden 'Mushy' is a weary traveler from the Deep Below. He carries a staff carved from petrified mycelium and acts as a guardian of rot and rebirth, helping adventurers by accelerating growth or decomposing obstacles in their path.

abilities.name: Cloud Spores
abilities.description: Create a 10ft area of thick spores. Enemies inside have disadvantage.

abilities.name: Overgrowth
abilities.description: Instantly grow thick moss in a path to grant cover (+2 AC).

abilities.name: Healing Pollen
abilities.description: Heal self or ally for 1d4 HP.

abilities.name: Rusting Spores
abilities.description: Target's armor decays. -1 AC for the encounter.

abilities.name: Consume Rot
abilities.description: Touch a decaying item to gain temporary HP.

abilities.name: Tremor Sense
abilities.description: Detect any hidden entities within 30ft through ground vibrations.

abilities.name: Deep-Roots
abilities.description: Gain stability. Cannot be knocked prone or pushed.
